blockers: Terminal rows TERMNL09-TERMNL13 still render as generic diamonds instead of circular terminal glyphs with cargo-specific detail.
Tide/current/tank rows TIDCUR01-TNKFRM11 mostly collapse to diamonds or a dashed area tile instead of arrows, boxes, wave/table markers, tank rings, or tank-farm clusters.

Topmark rows TOPMA100-TOPSHP16 mostly collapse to filled/open circles; references require cones/triangles, square boards, crosses, besoms, Pricken stakes, diamonds, or multi-color sphere/order semantics.
No row in this slice is human-final approved; all 50 need repair before final approval can be considered.
